span.p: Is there a lender DSCR covenant at risk?

span.p: NOI stabilization is first priority - retain tenants or fill vacancy

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is deferred maintenance threatening tenant retention or building safety?

span.p: Address deferred maintenance first - tenant retention protects NOI

span.p: Is vacancy concentrated in one functional area that blocks leasing?

span.p: Reconfiguration CapEx unlocks leasing - evaluate yield on cost

span.p: Do value-add improvements yield above the market cap rate?

span.p: Invest in value-add CapEx with positive spread to cap rate

span.p: Focus operating budget on leasing concessions and retention - defer CapEx
